name: Spiritual Weapon
description: You create a floating, spectral weapon within range that lasts for the duration. The weapon can take whatever form you choose. When you cast this spell, you can make a melee spell attack against a creature within 5 feet of the weapon. On a hit, the target takes Force damage equal to 1d8 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. As a Bonus Action on your later turns, you can move the weapon up to 20 feet and repeat the attack against a creature within 5 feet of it. Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The damage increases by 1d8 for every two spell slot levels above 2.
